findings.description: Knowledge file has 3 sections (s1, s2, s3), but the source TOC lists 4 internal anchored sections: 全体構成, 基本概念, メッセージング基盤API, メッセージングプロバイダ. The `.. _messaging_api:` label appears at the very end of the provided source with no following content, indicating the source file was truncated. Sections for メッセージング基盤API and メッセージングプロバイダ are entirely absent from the knowledge file. The automated check S9 (count 3 < 6) corroborates this.
findings.source_evidence: Source TOC: `- メッセージング基盤API_` and `- メッセージングプロバイダ_` (internal anchors in same file). Source ends with `.. _messaging_api:` label but no heading or content follows.

findings.description: s2 hints include 応答不要メッセージ送信 and 同期応答メッセージ送信 but are missing 応答不要メッセージ受信 and 同期応答メッセージ受信. All four appear explicitly in the s2 section content as the complete list of message types handled by メッセージング基盤API.
findings.source_evidence: Source 全体構成 section lists under メッセージング基盤API: 応答不要メッセージ送信, 同期応答メッセージ送信, 応答不要メッセージ受信, 同期応答メッセージ受信.

findings.description: The code example in s3 omits the comment `# フレームワーク制御ヘッダ部 (50byte)` present in the source. This comment specifies the total byte size (50 bytes) of the framework control header section, which is relevant for defining message physical layouts.

content.text:
**Summary of findings (3 issues, all minor):**

1. **section_issue** — Source TOC references 4 internal sections (全体構成, 基本概念, メッセージング基盤API, メッセージングプロバイダ), but the knowledge file only covers 2 of them. The source appears truncated at the `.. _messaging_api:` anchor; sections for メッセージング基盤API and メッセージングプロバイダ are entirely absent. Consistent with the S9 automated warning.

2. **hints_missing** — s2 hints omit 応答不要メッセージ受信 and 同期応答メッセージ受信, which appear in the s2 section content as part of the four message types listed under メッセージング基盤API.

3. **omission** — The code example in s3 drops the comment `# フレームワーク制御ヘッダ部 (50byte)`, which states the total size (50 bytes) of the framework control header — potentially relevant for physical message layout decisions.

result:
**Summary of findings (3 issues, all minor):**

1. **section_issue** — Source TOC references 4 internal sections (全体構成, 基本概念, メッセージング基盤API, メッセージングプロバイダ), but the knowledge file only covers 2 of them. The source appears truncated at the `.. _messaging_api:` anchor; sections for メッセージング基盤API and メッセージングプロバイダ are entirely absent. Consistent with the S9 automated warning.

2. **hints_missing** — s2 hints omit 応答不要メッセージ受信 and 同期応答メッセージ受信, which appear in the s2 section content as part of the four message types listed under メッセージング基盤API.

3. **omission** — The code example in s3 drops the comment `# フレームワーク制御ヘッダ部 (50byte)`, which states the total size (50 bytes) of the framework control header — potentially relevant for physical message layout decisions.
